_comment: INTENTIONAL ANTIPATTERN FIXTURE — DO NOT FIX. This .mcp.json is a deliberately-broken manifest used to smoke-test fakoli-crew's `mcp-critic` per the procedure in tests/RECIPES.md (T7). The bug below is intentional. Intentional bug: the stdio server entry is missing the required `args` field. Expected critic finding: MUST FIX — per the mcp-critic manifest-schema checklist, 'stdio servers have command (string) and args (array of strings); missing or wrong-typed fails install.' The server will silently fail to start because Claude Code's MCP loader requires args (even an empty array `[]`) for stdio transports. Expected verdict: FAIL (1x MUST FIX).
